description: Rolled when a Solomani career Event roll results in 'Life Event. Roll on the Solomani Life Events table.' Roll 2D.

2.title: Sickness or Injury
2.text: You are injured or become sick. Roll on the Injury Table.

3.title: Political Upheaval
3.text: A political crisis rocks your world — a Party purge, a SolSec crackdown, or violent factional struggle. Gain a Rival from a competing Party faction or government body.

4.title: Racial Incident
4.text: You are caught up in an act of racial discrimination or inter-species violence, whether as witness, victim, or unwilling participant. A relationship in your life suffers as a result. Gain a Rival or an Enemy.

5.title: SolSec Scrutiny
5.text: A SolSec monitor files a report questioning your loyalty or political reliability. The cloud over your record costs you. Suffer DM-1 on your next advancement roll.

6.title: Party Connections
6.text: Your involvement with the Solomani Movement opens an unexpected door. Gain a Contact in the Solomani Party, the Confederation government, or a Party-affiliated corporation.

8.title: Betrayal
8.text: You are betrayed in some fashion by a friend or colleague. If you have any Contacts or Allies, convert one into a Rival or Enemy. Otherwise, gain a Rival or Enemy.

9.title: Relocation
9.text: You relocate to another world within the Confederation — willingly, for opportunity, or under orders. You gain DM+2 to your next Qualification roll.

10.title: Good Fortune
10.text: Something breaks your way — unexpected credits, a Party favour, or a private opportunity pays off. Gain DM+2 to any one Benefit roll.

11.title: Solomani Pride
11.text: Your demonstrated commitment to the Solomani Cause earns you respect and recognition within the Confederation. Gain SOC+1.

12.title: Unusual Event
12.text: Something out of the ordinary occurs. Roll 1D on the Unusual Event sub-table.

sub_table.1: Psionic Discovery: You encounter evidence of psionic potential — your own or someone else's. You may immediately test your Psionic Strength and, if you qualify, take the Psion career next term.
sub_table.2: Alien Encounter: You have a significant encounter with non-human sophonts. Gain Science 1 and a Contact among an alien species.
sub_table.3: Terran Artefact: You acquire a genuine relic from Old Earth — pre-spaceflight or early interstellar era — of immense historical value to Solomani scholars.
sub_table.4: Amnesia: Something happened to you during this period, but you have no memory of it.
sub_table.5: Confederation Elite: You briefly came into contact with the highest levels of the Confederation — a Grand Admiral, a Secretary General, or Solomani Security leadership.
sub_table.6: Ancient Terran Technology: You come into possession of something dating to before the Imperium — or even before the Long Night.
